scripts.build: pnpm build:status && pnpm build:library && pnpm build:manager && pnpm build:console && pnpm build:site
scripts.check: pnpm check:style && pnpm check:proto && pnpm check:status && pnpm check:library && pnpm check:manager && pnpm check:console && pnpm check:site
scripts.check:console: go vet ./services/console/... && go build ./services/console/... && pnpm --filter @realtime-me/console check
scripts.check:library: go vet ./services/library/... && go build ./services/library/... && pnpm --filter @realtime-me/library-web typecheck
scripts.check:status: go vet ./services/status/... ./libs/go/authn && go build ./services/status/... && pnpm --filter @realtime-me/status-web typecheck
scripts.check:style: biome check apps/web packages/library-web packages/status-web packages/web-shell packages/web-ui services/manager tools
scripts.format: biome format --write apps/web packages/library-web packages/status-web packages/web-shell packages/web-ui services/manager tools && buf format -w
scripts.generate: buf generate --template buf.gen.go.yaml --path proto/realtime/me/auth --path proto/realtime/me/status --path proto/realtime/me/site --path proto/realtime/me/library && buf generate --template buf.gen.auth.yaml --path proto/realtime/me/auth && buf generate --template buf.gen.status.yaml --path proto/realtime/me/status --path proto/realtime/me/site && buf generate --template buf.gen.library.yaml --path proto/realtime/me/library && buf generate --template buf.gen.manager.yaml --path proto/realtime/me/auth/v1/permission.proto --path proto/realtime/me/manager && node tools/normalize-generated.mjs
